generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired FBI counterterrorism specialist, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The 2024 London attack showed what happens when we don't give our agencies the tools they need. We can't afford to wait for another tragedy. Expanding domestic security powers isn't about giving up freedoms - it's about protecting them. The real threat isn't government overreach, it's the terrorists who want to destroy our way of life. #NationalSecurityFirst #ProtectOurFreedoms
